things.name: Lviv Historic Centre
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage old town with Renaissance, Baroque and Gothic architecture

things.name: High Castle Hill (Vysokyi Zamok)
things.description: Hilltop park with panoramic views over the old town and Lviv's rooftops

things.name: Rynok Square (Market Square)
things.description: Historic market square surrounded by colourful merchant houses and the 16th-century Town Hall

things.name: Lviv Coffee Culture
things.description: Lviv claims to have introduced coffee to Europe - explore the coffee mine and themed cafes

things.name: Dormition Church (Uspenska)
things.description: Renaissance ensemble with a three-apse church, the Korniakt Tower and the Chapel of the Three Saints

things.name: Lychakiv Cemetery
things.description: Romantic 19th-century cemetery with elaborate sculptures and the graves of Ukrainian heroes

things.name: Armenian Cathedral of the Assumption
things.description: 14th-century Armenian cathedral with unique courtyard and 17th-century frescoes

things.name: Pharmacy Museum
things.description: 19th-century pharmacy with original fittings, the oldest operating pharmacy in Ukraine

things.name: Shevchenkivskyi Hai Open-Air Museum
things.description: Folk architecture park with 120 original wooden buildings from the Carpathian region

things.name: Lviv Chocolate Workshop
things.description: Famous chocolate workshops making the city's renowned handmade truffles and pralines
